offer: For medical office administrators processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate matching causes cash flow gaps. We provide automated reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Inaccurate matching of patient records with insurance payments
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical office administrators
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to medical office administrators with demo video
Join community forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users manually enter records and generate reports for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
